zh.lifeSummary: Manfredo II del Vasto, 2nd Marquis of Saluzzo是Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo和Donna Eléanora di Arborea的兒子，於1145年出生在義大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左。他於1182年6月與Alasia degli Aleramici del Monferrato在義大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1215年1月22日在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在義大利皮蒙特辛雷福洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Manfredo II del Vasto, 2nd Marquis of Saluzzo是Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo和Donna Eléanora di Arborea的儿子，于1145年出生在意大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左。他于1182年6月与Alasia degli Aleramici del Monferrato在意大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1215年1月22日在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在意大利皮蒙特辛雷福洛。

nameMeanings.name: del
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Lorraine): variant of the habitational name Delle 2 or a masculine form of a homonymous topographic name. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Spanish or Italian preposition with fused definite article del ‘of the’, which forms first part of surnames such as Del Cid and Del Signore , has apparently been in some instances counted as an independent surname.

variants.name: Delle
meanings: German: habitational name from a place so named in North Rhine-Westphalia or a topographic name (see   Dell  ).

French (Lorraine): habitational name from Delle, a place in Territoire de Belfort. Alternatively, a topographic name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone who lived near a prominent alder tree or trees, from elle, a derivative of Middle High German erle ‘alder’.

nameMeanings.name: Vasto,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Fernando, Angel, Arnando, Arturo, Carlos, Dominga, Enrique, Jairo, Luis, Luz, Sergio.  Italian Carmine, Dante, Giro, Giuseppe, Michelangelo, Nunzi.

Spanish and Italian: ethnic name from vasco ‘Basque’, denoting someone from the Basque Country, or from a Spanish byname or Italian personal name of the same derivation. The inhabitants of this region, which extends between southern France and northern Spain, are first recorded in Latin sources as the Vascones, a word of unexplained etymology. See also Gascoigne . The Basques’ own name for themselves is Euskaldun. Compare Basco .
Spanish and Portuguese: old personal name corresponding to   Velasco  .

variants.name: Vasquez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Carlos, Manuel, Jesus, Luis, Francisco, Miguel, Mario, Jorge, Pedro, Guadalupe.
Spanish (also Vásquez): patronymic from the personal name Vasco .

variants.name: Gascoigne
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Anglo-Norman French Gascon, Middle English Gascoun, Gascon ‘Gascon, native of Gascony’ or the adjective Gascuinz ‘of Gascony’. The name of the region derives from that of the Basques, who are found close by and formerly extended into this region as well; they are first named in Roman sources as Vascōnes, but the original meaning of the name derived from a root eusk- in the non-Indo-European language that they still speak today, is completely obscure. By the Middle Ages the Basques had been displaced from most of Gascony by speakers of Gascon (a dialect of Occitan, related to French), who were proverbial for their boastfulness. In the 11th century Gascony united with Aquitaine and was thus held by England between 1154 and 1453.

variants.name: Vasques
meanings: Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name   Vasco  .

variants.name: Vaz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Antonio, Manuel, Luis, Alfredo, Alvaro, Joaquin, Jorge, Mario, Victorio, Adriano, Aires, Amandio.  Portuguese Joao, Damiao, Afonso, Henrique, Joaquim, Ligia, Nelio, Paulo.
Portuguese: patronymic from   Vasco  . This surname is also found on the west coast of India, where it was taken by Portuguese colonists.

nameMeanings.name: Manfredo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, borne by a 13th-century king of Sicily. See Manfred .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Manfredo II del Vasto, 2nd Marquis of Saluzzo was born in 1145, in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy as the son of Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo and Donna Eléanora di Arborea. He married Alasia degli Aleramici del Monferrato in June 1182, in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. He died on 22 January 1215, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Revello, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Manfredo II del Vasto, 2nd Marquis of Saluzzo est né en 1145, à Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie, fils de Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo et Donna Eléanora di Arborea. Il a épousé Alasia degli Aleramici del Monferrato en juin 1182, à Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 22 janvier 1215, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Manfredo II del Vasto, 2nd Marquis of Saluzzo wurde 1145 in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italien, als Sohn von Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo und Donna Eléanora di Arborea geboren. Er hat im Juni 1182 in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italien Alasia degli Aleramici del Monferrato geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Januar 1215 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Manfredo II del Vasto, 2nd Marquis of Saluzzo è nato il nel 1145 nel Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia come figlio di Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo e Donna Eléanora di Arborea. Lui sposato Alasia degli Aleramici del Monferrato nel giugno 1182, nel Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì il 22 gennaio 1215, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Manfredo II del Vasto, 2nd Marquis of Saluzzoは1145年にイタリアピエモントクウネオサルズゾでManfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de SaluzzoとDonna Eléanora di Arboreaの息子として生まれた。1182年6月にイタリアピエモントクウネオサルズゾでAlasia degli Aleramici del Monferratoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1215年1月22日に故郷で70歳で死去し，イタリアピエモントクウネオレベロにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Manfredo II del Vasto, 2nd Marquis of Saluzzo(은)는 1145년 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 살루즈오에서 Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo(와)과 Donna Eléanora di Arborea의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1182년 6월 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 살루즈오에서 Alasia degli Aleramici del Monferrato(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1215년 1월 22일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 러에벨로에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Manfredo II del Vasto, 2nd Marquis of Saluzzo nasceu em 1145, em Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália filho de Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo e Donna Eléanora di Arborea. Ele casou-se com Alasia degli Aleramici del Monferrato em junho de 1182, em Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de janeiro de 1215, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Manfredo II del Vasto, 2nd Marquis of Saluzzo родился в 1145 г. в местности салуззо, кунео, пиемонт, Италия. Его родителей звали Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo и Donna Eléanora di Arborea. Он женился на женщине по имени Alasia degli Aleramici del Monferrato июнь 1182 г. в местности салуззо, кунео, пиемонт, Италия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Он умер 22 января 1215 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности ривеллоу, кунео, пиемонт, Италия.

sm.from 1175 to 27 February 1215: mai le 1175 e o'o I le 27 Fepuari 1215

es.lifeSummary: Manfredo II del Vasto, 2nd Marquis of Saluzzo nació en 1145, en Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia como hijo de Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo y Donna Eléanora di Arborea. Se casó con Alasia degli Aleramici del Monferrato en junio de 1182, en Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Murió el 22 de enero de 1215, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia.
